# Happy Roof LLC — Tampa Bay Roofing Contractor

> Happy Roof is a licensed and insured roofing contractor serving the Tampa Bay area in Florida. We specialize in residential and commercial roof replacement, repair, storm damage restoration, and free inspections. Florida License #CCC1337380.

## Company Information

- **Name:** Happy Roof LLC
- **Location:** 141 Stevens Ave #12, Oldsmar, FL 34677
- **Phone:** (813) 595-7663
- **Website:** https://www.happyroof.com
- **Email:** info@happyroof.com
- **License:** Florida Roofing Contractor License #CCC1337380
- **Service Area:** Tampa Bay, FL — including Tampa, St. Petersburg, Clearwater, Oldsmar, Palm Harbor, Largo, Dunedin, Tarpon Springs, Safety Harbor, Pinellas Park, Brandon, Wesley Chapel, Riverview, Lutz, Land O' Lakes, and surrounding areas in Hillsborough, Pinellas, and Pasco counties.

## Services

- **Roof Replacement:** Complete residential and commercial roof replacement with asphalt shingles, metal, tile, or flat roof systems.
- **Roof Repair:** Leak repair, shingle replacement, flashing repair, and emergency tarping.
- **Storm Damage Repair:** Hurricane and storm damage roof repair with full insurance claim assistance.
- **Free Roof Inspection:** Professional roof inspections for real estate, insurance, and maintenance — no charge, no obligation.
- **Commercial Roofing:** TPO, EPDM, modified bitumen, and metal roofing for commercial properties.
- **Roof Maintenance:** Preventive maintenance programs to extend roof lifespan.

## Credentials

- Florida Licensed Roofing Contractor (#CCC1337380)
- Fully Insured and Bonded
- Owens Corning Installer
- Up to 15-Year Workmanship Warranty
- 5.0 Star Google Rating (5 verified reviews)
- Serving Tampa Bay since July 2025
- 30+ years combined team roofing experience

- Emergency services available 24/7
